title: Company Names Tribunal decision: AXALLC LTD
body: "Application number 5264  Applicant Axa objected to the name used by Axallc Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On 24 December 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of AXALLC LTD is changed to 16142806 LTD. "
